case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS HERNANDEZ, ROGER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,131.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ROGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
